findingDetails.title: The new usage wrapper presents an unconstrained dynamic script loader as an implementation pattern
findingDetails.evidence: The packet-added OVERVIEW recommends applying the documented loading patterns while loadScript(src) assigns an unconstrained caller value to script.src without a trusted-static-URL contract, HTTPS origin allowlist, or integrity metadata; the companion third-party reference demonstrates those controls.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact scoped searches found this generic unconstrained loader and a separate allowlisted implementation; inspected shell, DOM-sink, cookie, and secret examples were explicitly marked dangerous or bounded to non-sensitive data.
findingDetails.recommendation: State that src must be a trusted static URL, or validate HTTPS against an origin allowlist and add integrity metadata where available; link the safe third-party loader pattern.

traceabilityChecks.result: The scope is documentation-only with no executable capability, but one packet-added usage wrapper creates a P2 recommendation-framing advisory.
